titleStmt.title: SII 9.270: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 270. (A.R. No. 733 of 1917.) ON A PILLAR SET UP IN THE BAZAAR IN THE VILLAGE MADHUDI, MADAKSIRA TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1091, Virōdhi, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 13, Bṛihavāra, corresponding to A.D. 1169 August 7 Thursday. The month was Adhika-Śrāvaṇa. The record refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Jagadēkamalladēva ruling from Kalyāṇa. His feudatory, the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jagadēkamalla-Mallidēva-Chōḷamahārāja, son of Iruṅgōḷa-Chōḷamahārāja and grandson of Gōvindarasa, was ruling from Heñjeru. The latter's civil and military officers Bammaṇa and Nāmaṇa, sons of Echimayya and grandsons of Ayyappayya were Śaivas. Nāmaṇa who was a Tantrapāḷa built the temple of Nāgēśvaradēva at Madhuvāḍi and endowed it with a garden and wet lands for the service of the god and for the feeding of Brāhman tapōdhanas. The date cited in the inscription appears to be the date on which the record was engraved and set up. At this period the Chāḷukya dominions were under the Kaḷachuryas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śva(sva)sti śrījayaścābhyudayaśca .
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmara
cāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁ
bhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
śvasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpri
thvīvallabhaṁ mahārājā
dhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāra
ka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyā
bharaṇaṁ śrīmatupratāpacakrava
rtti jagadēkamalladēvara vijaya
rājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddha
mānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ sa
luttaṁ kalyāṇada nelevīḍinoḷu su
khasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyu
ttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷu .
gōviṁdarasaṁguttamatāvibikāṁtegaviḷāta
ḷaṁ pogaḷvinegeṁ kēvaḷamēṁ puṭṭidaṁ dhātrī
vallabhanenisi negaḷdiruṁgōḷanripa .
Ātana taneyaṁgativikhyātaṁ jagadēka
malla mallinripāḷaṁ bhūtaḷapatigaḷoḷā
rindītaṁ migilenisi negaḷdanurbītaḷa
doḷu . śvasti samadhigatapaṁcamahā
śabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ jagadēka
mallamallidēvacōḷamahārājaru heṁ
jeṟa nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōda
diṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatpādapadmōpa
jīvigaḷu surarājapurakamaḷakāpurakā
dharaṇēṁdrapurakkadē(ṁ) teṟadiṁdaṁ parkkipaḍe kā
rttikēyanapuravadhikaṁ koṭṭitoṇe samastāvani
yoḷu . Ā koṭṭitoṇege negaḷdaṁ lōka
stutanenipa kārttikēyana bhrityaṁ śrīkā
ntanayyapayyaṁ prākaṭamenalēcimayya
nātana taneyaṁ . jananutane yēcimayyaṁ
vibhu taṁde patibrate muddibe tāyi manuca
ritaṁ pogaḷteya negaḷteya rūḍhiya mallidēva
bhūpane tanagāḷdanīśvarane naṁbida deyvavenippa
nāvanō varamaṁtri bammaṇa nāmaṇanantevoliṁ
tu no varu .

nirmmisidaṁ sadāśivapadāṁbujadoḷu mana
maṁ viṟōdhiyaṁ nemmipanaṁtakānana
teṟadiṁ patigoḷvanārcipaṁ nirmmaḷaṁ
nuḍidudaṁ pusiyaṁ śucidharmma
ḷu dharmmajaneṁdu baṇnipudu herggaḍe bamma
ṇanaṁ dharātaḷa . Ātananujaṁ negaḷteya śīte
dēviyane kaṁḍu mudrikeyaṁ koṭṭāta patihi
tadalkene bhūtaḷadoḷu taṁtrapāḷa nāmaṁ
negaḷda . manujamanōjaneṁbudabaḷājana
kantakaneṁbudāṁtaraṁ muḷidu kaḍaṁgi kolve
ḍege bhānujaneṁbudu bēḷvavargge hāvagi para
nārigeyeṁbudu dharitrinegaḷteya taṁtrapāḷanāma
nanuduvrittarātigajabhīmananuddhatadaityarā
mana . Ī niḍugallaṁ kāvaḍe nīnalla nāmaneṁdiruṁgōḷadha
ritrināthanittanīyalkiḷdaṁ taṁtrapāḷa nāmaṁ sukhadi . Aṁ
tiḷdanirddu girijākāṁtaṁgiraliduve sēbyamenutaṁ manado
ḷu saṁtōṣamāgi māḍisidaṁ tāṁ vibhu nāmaṇaṁ śivā
ḷayameseye . śvasti śrīmanumahāpradhānaṁ sē
nādhipati hiriyataṁtrapāḷa nāmaṇaṁ madhuvāḍi
ya śrīnāgēśvaradēvara nivēdyakkaṁ naṁdādīvigegavaṁ
gabhōgakkaṁ pātrapāvuḷakkaṁ jīrṇnōdhdhārakkaṁ
caitrapavitrakkaṁ brāhmaṇatapōdhanarāhāradā
nakka vuttarāyaṇasaṁkramaṇanimittavāgi hiriyakeṟe
ya baḍagaṇa tuṁbina kāluveya baḷḷiyatōṭa khaṁ 1 kō 10
kabbu kālveya paḍuvaṇa Uṟuga gaddeyoḷagāgi mūḍa
ṇa koppuradali gadde khaṁ 4 Ūriṁ mūḍaṇa maṇalagu
yyalu 1 vēraḍārakeyi dēvara dīvigege gāṇa 1 I
ntivellavaṁ sarbbanamaśyavāgi biṭṭa datti Intī dharmmavaṁ
pratipāḷisidavaru vāraṇāsiyalu kōṭi kavileya
kōṭi brāhmaṇarige dānaṁgoṭṭa phalavaṁ paḍevaru . Ī dha
rmevaṁ keḍisidavaru vāraṇāsiyalu kōṭi ka
vilevaṁ kōṭi brāhmaṇaruvaṁ vadhiyisida dō
ṣavakku . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti
vasuṁdharāṁ . śaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇāṁ viṣṭhā
yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . yasya yasya yadā
bhūmi tasya tasya tadā phalaḥ . dēvasvaṁtu viṣaṁ ghō
raṁ na viṣaṁ viṣamucyatē . viṣamē
kākinaṁ haṁti dēvasvaṁ putrapautrikaṁ .
svasti śrīmatu sakavarṣa 1091 ne
ya virōdhisaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa suddha trayōdasi
brihavāradaṁdu māḍida sāsana maṁgaḷa
mahāśrī śrī . mahēsvara kammāṟa mē
ḷōjanuṁ madavaḷige jaṁnikabbevu mā
diyaṇanuṁ �yo sthānaduṁbaḷisahi
takkoḍeyaru Ācāravaṁtanappa
pūjāriyanāḷdu pūjisuvaru .
taṁtrapāla nāmayyaṁ sthiraṁjīvi .
Digital edition of SII 9.270 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
